chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI I. T. R. A. No. 211 / 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ HEARING CASE / PRIORITY 1) For hearing on Misc. No. 1699/2024. 2) For hearing of main case. 23.09.2024. Mr. Shams Mohiuddin Ansari, Advocates for Applicant. Mr. S. Ahsan Ali Shah, Advocate for Respondent. ________________ Pursuant to order passed on 26.08.2024, learned Counsel for the department concedes and submits that he has instructions that the matter be remanded to the original officer. In view of the above, the impugned order is hereby set aside and the matter stands remanded to the Assessing Officer who shall pass the order in accordance with law after affording opportunity of hearing to the Applicant. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
